gt_sql: SELECT T2.DisplayName FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Score BETWEEN 1 AND 5 AND T2.DownVotes = 0
pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.DisplayName
FROM comments c
JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DownVotes = 0
  AND c.Score BETWEEN 1 AND 5;
question: In comments with score between 1 to 5, list down the display names of the users with 0 down votes.
